steps.title: Identify co-interior angles from the parallel lines and transversal
steps.content: Lines $r$ and $s$ are parallel, and line $m$ is a transversal that intersects both. The angles $x$ and $y$ are co-interior angles (same-side interior angles)—both lie between the two parallel lines on the same side of the transversal.

steps.title: Apply the parallel lines property
steps.content:
When two parallel lines are cut by a transversal, co-interior angles are supplementary:
$$x + y = 180^{\circ}$$
Rearranging for $x$:
$$x = 180^{\circ} - y$$

steps.title: Use the constraint to find the range of x
steps.content:
We are given that $y \lt 65$. Substituting into $x = 180^{\circ} - y$:
$$x = 180^{\circ} - y \gt 180^{\circ} - 65^{\circ}$$
$$x \gt 115^{\circ}$$
This is the correct answer.
